translations.Transfer of {url} failed because its che: Transfer of {url} failed because its checksum did not match
translations.Transfer of {url} was blocked because it: Transfer of {url} was blocked because it uses a restricted address
translations.An upload by link was unsuccessful: An upload by link was unsuccessful
translations.An upload by link is being processed: An upload by link is being processed
translations.An upload by link was successful: An upload by link was successful
Add a file to Nextcloud from a web link.
translations.\"Upload by link\" functionality for Nex:
"Upload by link" functionality for Nextcloud. Transfer files
                using the full bandwidth available to your server. Avoid the need to
                leave your own device online to finish an upload.
translations.Some websites provide a checksum to veri: Some websites provide a checksum to verify the file is not corrupted.
translations.Starts the transfer right away instead o: Starts the transfer right away instead of waiting for the next background job cycle. Keep this page open until it finishes. Leaving or closing the page cancels the transfer.
translations.Queued transfers can be tracked under Se: Queued transfers can be tracked under Settings > Transfer.
translations.The download failed. The remote server r: The download failed. The remote server responded with status {statusCode}.
translations.The download failed. The remote server c: The download failed. The remote server could not be reached.
translations.The URL is not allowed by this server's: The URL is not allowed by this server's security settings.
translations.The checksum did not match. The file was: The checksum did not match. The file was discarded.
The transfer could not be started.
translations.The file has been transferred successful: The file has been transferred successfully.
translations.The transfer is queued and will begin pr: The transfer is queued and will begin processing soon.
The transfer could not be queued.
translations.Progress tracking requires Redis or Memc: Progress tracking requires Redis or Memcached. See the Nextcloud documentation for setup instructions.
